text:
Classification of Diseases, 10th Revision, Clinical 
Modification/Procedure Coding System (ICD-10-CM/PCS) codes into clinically meaningful categories. 
The CCSR for ICD-10-PCS procedures aggregates more than 80,000 ICD-10-PCS procedure 
codes into over 320 clinical categories across 31 clinical domains. 

SHORT NAME: LINE_PRCDR_CCS_CTGRY_CD 

LONG NAME: LINE_PRCDR_CCS_CTGRY_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): OT line 

VALUES: Eight-character
